metaTitle: Understanding Khand Jaati  - Yogesh Samsi International Masterclass
metaDescription: The masterclass offers an in-depth exploration of Tabla solo performance. This is an opportunity to participate in an intensive workshop for talented young Tabla students by the world renowned Tabla player Yogesh Samsi, disciple of the late Ustad Allarakha and will be held on Saturday 14th March & Sunday 15th March 2026 via Zoom (Video conferencing & Webinar Platform).
title: Understanding Khand Jaati
heroImageAlt: Yogesh Samsi sitting with his tabla
